description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/typed_rlm.rs] Implement call(input: S::Input) async method. Create LlmTools with call limit, SubmitHandler, generate preamble via input.rlm_variable_descriptions(). Run iteration loop: query LLM, parse Command, handle REPL code execution with Python::with_gil, inject input vars, tools, SUBMIT. Check submit_rx for result.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Phase 4): `TypedRlm::call` main loop in `src/typed_rlm.rs`.
- Builds `LlmTools` with call limit.
- Creates `SubmitHandler::new::<S>()` and preamble (`generate_typed_preamble::<S>`).
- REPL loop: prompt → agent.prompt → parse `Command` → run Python code with Jupyter semantics → handle SUBMIT result or continue.
- On max_iterations: extraction_fallback or error.
- On SUBMIT success: convert `BamlValue` to `S::Output` and return `RlmResult`.

title: Task 4.3: Implement TypedRlm::call() main loop
